description: Collection of memories, demos, artifacts, press, and recovered code from the Quack.com era.
person_context: Steven Woods co-founded Quack.com, an early interactive voice assistant company acquired by AOL in 2000.
current_focus: Targeted follow-up on AOL by Phone, investor outcomes, first-party capture gaps, and preserved press

notable_items.label: EARFUL OF INTERNET / Voice portals read news and other information via phone to users on the go
US6687734B1 - System and method for determining if one web site has the same information as another web site
US20060149633A1 - System and method for advertising with an internet voice portal
